steps.code: <?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $p1 = new WC_Product_Simple(); $p1->set_name('Test T-Shirt'); $p1->set_regular_price('29.99'); $p1->set_status('publish'); $p1->save(); $p2 = new WC_Product_Simple(); $p2->set_name('Test Mug'); $p2->set_regular_price('14.99'); $p2->set_status('publish'); $p2->save(); echo 'Products seeded'; ?>

<?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $c1 = wc_create_new_customer('jane@example.com', 'janedoe', 'password'); if (!is_wp_error($c1)) { update_user_meta($c1, 'first_name', 'Jane'); update_user_meta($c1, 'last_name', 'Doe'); } $c2 = wc_create_new_customer('bob@example.com', 'bobsmith', 'password'); if (!is_wp_error($c2)) { update_user_meta($c2, 'first_name', 'Bob'); update_user_meta($c2, 'last_name', 'Smith'); } echo 'Customers seeded'; ?>

<?php require '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $products = wc_get_products(['limit' => 2]); $customers = get_users(['role' => 'customer', 'number' => 2]); $statuses = ['processing', 'completed', 'on-hold']; foreach ($statuses as $i => $status) { $order = wc_create_order(['customer_id' => $customers[$i % count($customers)]->ID ?? 0, 'status' => $status]); if ($products[$i % count($products)] ?? null) { $order->add_product($products[$i % count($products)], rand(1,3)); } $order->set_billing_first_name($customers[$i % count($customers)]->first_name ?? 'Guest'); $order->set_billing_last_name($customers[$i % count($customers)]->last_name ?? 'User'); $order->set_billing_email($customers[$i % count($customers)]->user_email ?? 'guest@example.com'); $order->calculate_totals(); $order->save(); } echo 'Orders seeded'; ?>

<?php /* PR #63751 CSS fix: replace hardcoded #999 with --wc-subtext for Select2 placeholders */ $css = '.select2-selection__placeholder { color: var(--wc-subtext) !important; }'; $file = '/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/woocommerce/assets/css/pr-63751-fix.css'; file_put_contents($file, $css); add_action('admin_enqueue_scripts', function() { wp_enqueue_style('pr-63751-fix', plugins_url('assets/css/pr-63751-fix.css', WC_PLUGIN_FILE)); }); echo 'PR fix applied'; ?>
